There are a plethora of black walnut trees lining both sides of the path. Access: Public.
There are a plethora of persimmon trees lining this path. Some of the fruit falls into the street but most of it remains in the surrounding fields Access: Public.
Large tree producing small but sweet persimmons between September and October. Easily accessibly from the side of the paved road. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
Good fruiting persimmon on the side of the road to the left. Access: Public.
